debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
⊢ Tendsto (fun k => k * Real.sinh (r / k)) atTop (nhds r)

proof:
simp only [mul_sinh_as_div, one_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩
failed_attempts:
simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2 ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, ?_⟩)
  filter_upwards [eventually_ne_atTop 0] with k hk using inv_ne_zero hk

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply Tendsto.comp (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r)
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, eventually_of_mem (mem_atTop 1)
    fun k hk => one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le zero_lt_one hk))⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  constructor
  · exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
  · filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
    exact one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  convert (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin
    ((eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun _ h => one_div_ne_zero h.ne')) using 1
  ext; simp

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  constructor
  · exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
  · filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

have h : Tendsto (fun k : ℝ => k⁻¹) atTop (𝓝[≠] 0) :=
    tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_eventually_ne
      ((eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero)
  simpa [mul_sinh_as_div] using (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp h

simp_rw [mul_sinh_as_div, one_div]
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
    (tendsto_inv_atTop_nhds_0_gt.mono_right (nhdsWithin_mono 0 fun _ ↦ ne_of_gt))

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin <|
    (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun _ h ↦ ne_of_gt (inv_pos.2 h)

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin ?_)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk
  exact ne_of_gt (inv_pos.mpr hk)

simp_rw [mul_sinh_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2
    ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ ↦ one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div, div_eq_mul_inv]
  apply Tendsto.comp (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r)
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp <| tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_within <|
    (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ ↦ inv_ne_zero

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  exact (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin
    ((eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => one_div_ne_zero))

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun k ↦ one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin ?_)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk).symm

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin
    ((eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero)

rw [tendsto_congr (mul_sinh_as_div r)]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun _ h => one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt h)⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds_of_eventually_within tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_
  filter_upwards [eventually_ne_atTop 0] with k hk using one_div_ne_zero hk

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk => inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  constructor
  · simp only [one_div]; exact tendsto_inv_atTop_zero
  · exact (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk ↦ one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk).symm

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_gt_atTop 0).mono fun k hk => (ne_of_gt (inv_pos.2 hk)).symm⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  apply tendsto_inv_atTop_zero.tendsto_nhdsWithin
  filter_upwards [eventually_ne_atTop 0] with k hk using inv_ne_zero hk

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp (tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff.2 ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, ?_⟩)
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using one_div_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div, one_div]
  convert (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp _
  · ext k
    simp [div_eq_mul_inv]
  · rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
    exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => inv_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  apply (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp
  rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff]
  exact ⟨tendsto_inv_atTop_zero, (eventually_ne_atTop 0).mono fun _ => one_div_ne_zero⟩

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div, one_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_
  refine tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhds tendsto_inv_atTop_zero ?_
  filter_upwards [eventually_gt_atTop 0] with k hk using inv_ne_zero (ne_of_gt hk)

simp only [mul_sinh_as_div]
  refine (tendsto_sinh_rx_over_x r).comp ?_

  exact ⟨by simpa only [one_div] using tendsto_inv_atTop_zero,
